title: CCL - Turn off/on the device
scenario: CCL (Customizable Controls Level) setting does not persist after power cycling the device
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your mobile device.
2. Ensure a CCL-supported Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
5. Set a Customizable Controls Level (CCL) value (e.g., Low, Medium, or High).
6. Power cycle the device by pressing and holding the Power button to turn it off, then press the Power button again to turn it on.
7. Wait for the device to reconnect to the app.
8. Navigate again to Device Settings → Advanced.
expected: The app shows the previously selected CCL setting (the value set in step 5).
